raw_response: The Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon is an excellent choice for business travel due to its lightweight design (1.09 kg) and impressive battery life of up to 12 hours. It features a high-quality OLED display and a robust Intel Core Ultra processor, making it ideal for productivity on the go. Although slightly over your budget at $1549, its durability and Windows Pro OS offer significant value for business use.
